Wuwei Information, Wuwei Overview, Wuwei Guide, China Guide.
Wuwei City covers area 33,249 square kilometers situated middle Gansu Province north part Hexi Corridor, bordering Lanzhou east, Jinchang west, Qilian Mountain south Tengger Desert north.
downtown area Weiwu east Hexi Corridor part Silk Road ancient China.
With history more than 2,000 years, Wuwei called Liangzhou ancient times where capital Qianliang, Houliang, Nanliang, Beiliang during Sixteen Dynasties Daliang Early Tang Dynasty were set.
history, Wuwei City important city where Central China West Regions communicated frequently, strategic pass Silk Road Buddhism center North China.
renowned poetry, song instrument Liangzhou were formed developed here.
cultural relics include Wong Niangniang archaeological site, bronze bells Dayun Temple Tang Dynasty, Haizang Temple, Luoshi Temple, Confucius Temple Wuwei, Bell Tower, Leitai Temple steles.
There many rivers natural solid reservoirs-the ices Qilian Mountain formed permanent snow high mountains.
early more than 5,000 years ago, human activities appeared this area.
name city means mighty powerful, which called praise achivements Qubing, general defeat Xiongnu Ethnic Group.
capital Qianliang, Houliang, Nanliang, Beiliang during Sixteen Dynasties Daliang Early Tang Dynasty were here.
long history, splendid cultures have been formed, such Wuliang Culture, Xixia Culture, Buddhism Culture Regional Culture.
much cultural units have been discovered, including five national cultural units, provincial cultural units.
Besides, three heritage collections involved 47,000 cultural collections.
most outstanding ones are: horse (Bronze Horse), stele (Xixia Stele), temple (Baita Temple), grotto (Tiantishan Tianti Mountain Grotto) temple (Confucius Temple).
Bronze Horse, praised highest peak classical artworks, become Chinese traveling graph sign; Xixia Stele unmatched precious trasure rare material study history Xixia; Baima Tower place where Prince Duan Yuan Dynasty Buddhist leader held Liangzhou Meeting historic witness Tibet's being part China; outstanding grotto early China, Tiantishan Grotto called primogenitor Chinese grotto; Luoshi Temple place that Mage Jiumoluoshi expounded texts Buddhism.
Confucius Temple Wuwei Confucius temples China with large scale.
addition, natural landscapes such snowy highlands, oasis sceneries deserts history culture enhance each other's beauty, both high cultural tourist value.
